description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named SHARPy Tests that runs on push to specific Python files, library files, and workflow files, and on pull requests to main, develop, and rc* branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a Python 3.10.8 matrix that checks out the repository, sets up Python and GCC, installs Mamba, and then performs a complex installation and testing process including building and installing the package, running unit tests with coverage, and uploading the coverage to Codecov.
